scripts.static-check: yarn workspace battleforthecrown-backend type-check && yarn workspace battleforthecrown-pixi type-check && yarn workspace battleforthecrown-backend lint:check --quiet && bash -o pipefail -c 'yarn workspace battleforthecrown-pixi lint:check --quiet 2>&1 | sed "/^\\[baseline-browser-mapping\\]/d"'
scripts.test: yarn test:smoke:preflight && yarn test:backend && yarn test:pixi && yarn workspace battleforthecrown-backend test:smoke:run
scripts.test:smoke: yarn test:smoke:preflight && yarn workspace battleforthecrown-backend test:smoke:run
scripts.dev:
echo '
  ▶ Frontend  http://localhost:5173
  ▶ Backend   http://localhost:15001
' && concurrently -n front,back -c magenta,blue -k "cd battleforthecrown-pixi && exec node_modules/.bin/vite --port 5173 --strictPort" "cd battleforthecrown-backend && PORT=15001 exec node_modules/.bin/nest start --watch"
